prompt: Build a Context person page for Saddam Hussein. Cover his rise from a poor village background to seizing power in Iraq, his Ba'athist ideology, how he ruled through fear and patronage, the Iran-Iraq War, the Gulf War, the 2003 invasion, and his execution. Make it honest about both his atrocities (Halabja chemical attack, Anfal campaign) and the chaos that followed his removal. No PDFs — use your knowledge.

assertions.name: File is complete valid HTML with DOCTYPE and closing tags
Uses --purple as primary accent (not amber) for person page
CSS includes all required design system variables
Contains all major sections: quick-facts, origins, ideology, legacy, connected topics, sources
Halabja chemical attack is mentioned with specific detail
Has a legacy grid with positive, negative, and complex cards
Includes accordion timeline entries with tl-item class
Body text sections are written as prose paragraphs, not bullet lists
